export namespace enumUtil { type UnionToIntersectionFn<T> = (T extends unknown ? (k: () => T) => void : never) extends ( k: infer Intersection ) => void ? Intersection : never; type GetUnionLast<T> = UnionToIntersectionFn<T> extends () => infer Last ? Last : never; type UnionToTuple<T, Tuple extends unknown[] = []> = [T] extends [never] ? Tuple : UnionToTuple<Exclude<T, GetUnionLast<T>>, [GetUnionLast<T>, ...Tuple]>; type CastToStringTuple<T> = T extends [string, ...string[]] ? T : never; export type UnionToTupleString<T> = CastToStringTuple<UnionToTuple<T>>; }
